info.name: Tally Prime - Payment & Receipt API
info.description: Complete API collection for fetching Payment and Receipt vouchers from Tally Prime via ODBC/XML

body.raw:
<ENVELOPE>
  <HEADER>
    <VERSION>1</VERSION>
    <TALLYREQUEST>Export</TALLYREQUEST>
    <TYPE>Collection</TYPE>
    <ID>PaymentVouchers</ID>
  </HEADER>
  <BODY>
    <DESC>
      <STATICVARIABLES>
        <SVCURRENTCOMPANY>M/S. SAHOO SANITARY (2025-26)</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
        <SVFROMDATE TYPE="Date">20250401</SVFROMDATE>
        <SVTODATE TYPE="Date">20251019</SVTODATE>
      </STATICVARIABLES>
      <TDL>
        <TDLMESSAGE>
          <COLLECTION NAME="PaymentVouchersList">
            <TYPE>Voucher</TYPE>
            <FETCH>DATE, VOUCHERNUMBER, PARTYLEDGERNAME, AMOUNT, VOUCHERTYPENAME, GUID, NARRATION</FETCH>
            <FILTER>PaymentFilter</FILTER>
          </COLLECTION>
          <SYSTEM TYPE="Formulae" NAME="PaymentFilter">
            $$IsPayment:$VOUCHERTYPENAME
          </SYSTEM>
        </TDLMESSAGE>
      </TDL>
    </DESC>
  </BODY>
</ENVELOPE>

request.description: Fetch all Payment vouchers for a date range

body.raw:
<ENVELOPE>
  <HEADER>
    <VERSION>1</VERSION>
    <TALLYREQUEST>Export</TALLYREQUEST>
    <TYPE>Collection</TYPE>
    <ID>ReceiptVouchers</ID>
  </HEADER>
  <BODY>
    <DESC>
      <STATICVARIABLES>
        <SVCURRENTCOMPANY>M/S. SAHOO SANITARY (2025-26)</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
        <SVFROMDATE TYPE="Date">20250401</SVFROMDATE>
        <SVTODATE TYPE="Date">20251019</SVTODATE>
      </STATICVARIABLES>
      <TDL>
        <TDLMESSAGE>
          <COLLECTION NAME="ReceiptVouchersList">
            <TYPE>Voucher</TYPE>
            <FETCH>DATE, VOUCHERNUMBER, PARTYLEDGERNAME, AMOUNT, VOUCHERTYPENAME, GUID, NARRATION</FETCH>
            <FILTER>ReceiptFilter</FILTER>
          </COLLECTION>
          <SYSTEM TYPE="Formulae" NAME="ReceiptFilter">
            $$IsReceipt:$VOUCHERTYPENAME
          </SYSTEM>
        </TDLMESSAGE>
      </TDL>
    </DESC>
  </BODY>
</ENVELOPE>

request.description: Fetch all Receipt vouchers for a date range

<ENVELOPE>
  <HEADER>
    <VERSION>1</VERSION>
    <TALLYREQUEST>Export</TALLYREQUEST>
    <TYPE>Collection</TYPE>
    <ID>ContraVouchers</ID>
  </HEADER>
  <BODY>
    <DESC>
      <STATICVARIABLES>
        <SVCURRENTCOMPANY>M/S. SAHOO SANITARY (2025-26)</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
        <SVFROMDATE TYPE="Date">20250401</SVFROMDATE>
        <SVTODATE TYPE="Date">20251019</SVTODATE>
      </STATICVARIABLES>
      <TDL>
        <TDLMESSAGE>
          <COLLECTION NAME="ContraVouchersList">
            <TYPE>Voucher</TYPE>
            <FETCH>DATE, VOUCHERNUMBER, PARTYLEDGERNAME, AMOUNT, VOUCHERTYPENAME, GUID, NARRATION</FETCH>
            <FILTER>ContraFilter</FILTER>
          </COLLECTION>
          <SYSTEM TYPE="Formulae" NAME="ContraFilter">
            $$IsContra:$VOUCHERTYPENAME
          </SYSTEM>
        </TDLMESSAGE>
      </TDL>
    </DESC>
  </BODY>
</ENVELOPE>

<ENVELOPE>
  <HEADER>
    <VERSION>1</VERSION>
    <TALLYREQUEST>Export</TALLYREQUEST>
    <TYPE>Collection</TYPE>
    <ID>JournalVouchers</ID>
  </HEADER>
  <BODY>
    <DESC>
      <STATICVARIABLES>
        <SVCURRENTCOMPANY>M/S. SAHOO SANITARY (2025-26)</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
        <SVFROMDATE TYPE="Date">20250401</SVFROMDATE>
        <SVTODATE TYPE="Date">20251019</SVTODATE>
      </STATICVARIABLES>
      <TDL>
        <TDLMESSAGE>
          <COLLECTION NAME="JournalVouchersList">
            <TYPE>Voucher</TYPE>
            <FETCH>DATE, VOUCHERNUMBER, PARTYLEDGERNAME, AMOUNT, VOUCHERTYPENAME, GUID, NARRATION</FETCH>
            <FILTER>JournalFilter</FILTER>
          </COLLECTION>
          <SYSTEM TYPE="Formulae" NAME="JournalFilter">
            $$IsJournal:$VOUCHERTYPENAME
          </SYSTEM>
        </TDLMESSAGE>
      </TDL>
    </DESC>
  </BODY>
</ENVELOPE>

<ENVELOPE>
  <HEADER>
    <TALLYREQUEST>Export Data</TALLYREQUEST>
  </HEADER>
  <BODY>
    <EXPORTDATA>
      <REQUESTDESC>
        <REPORTNAME>Cash Book</REPORTNAME>
        <STATICVARIABLES>
          <SVCURRENTCOMPANY>M/S. SAHOO SANITARY (2025-26)</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
          <SVFROMDATE TYPE="Date">20250401</SVFROMDATE>
          <SVTODATE TYPE="Date">20251019</SVTODATE>
        </STATICVARIABLES>
      </REQUESTDESC>
    </EXPORTDATA>
  </BODY>
</ENVELOPE>

<ENVELOPE>
  <HEADER>
    <TALLYREQUEST>Export Data</TALLYREQUEST>
  </HEADER>
  <BODY>
    <EXPORTDATA>
      <REQUESTDESC>
        <REPORTNAME>Bank Book</REPORTNAME>
        <STATICVARIABLES>
          <SVCURRENTCOMPANY>M/S. SAHOO SANITARY (2025-26)</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
          <SVFROMDATE TYPE="Date">20250401</SVFROMDATE>
          <SVTODATE TYPE="Date">20251019</SVTODATE>
        </STATICVARIABLES>
      </REQUESTDESC>
    </EXPORTDATA>
  </BODY>
</ENVELOPE>
